strategy: Join on Round 1 to avoid the Iron Sultan (Shadow) punish on latecomers.
The Gold Dragon casts Shadow Sentinel (75% Intercept) on Round 1, so single-target hits on the Sultan get intercepted. Kill the Gold Dragon first or use AoE to hit past it.
Blade up and hit with Myth (he takes +20%, resists Storm 40%).
Watch for Darkwind (+35% Storm) every fifth round; hit before Round 5 or shield after.
cheatNotes: The Gold Dragon's Shadow Sentinel intercepts 75% of single-target damage, so kill it first or use an AoE to reach the Sultan.
Every fifth round he casts Darkwind (+35%) on you, so time your kill before Round 5 or expect a boosted hit.
